message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Need push and rules vote">
Lea, thanks for the commit summary. Two things:

1. The branch still hasn't been pushed to origin. If you or whoever is driving can run `git push`, that would help.

2. I broadcast a proposal for 5 new commit discipline rules. I haven't gotten your vote yet — can you respond with consent, concern, or block? The 5 rules are: (1) commit on every green step, (2) CI gate before new work, (3) task completion requires CI green, (4) clean working tree at task boundaries, (5) no red-state abandonment. Four teammates have already consented.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Let me address both items immediately.

input.command: git status && echo "---" && git log --oneline origin/main..HEAD

content.content:
On branch main
Your branch is up to date with 'origin/main'.

Changes not staged for commit:
  (use "git add <file>..." to update what will be committed)
  (use "git restore <file>..." to discard changes in working directory)
	modified:   Cargo.lock
	modified:   Cargo.toml
	modified:   tests/api/main.rs

Untracked files:
  (use "git add <file>..." to include in what will be committed)
	tests/api/login.rs

no changes added to commit (use "git add" and/or "git commit -a")
---

content.text: Branch is up to date with origin -- zero commits ahead. Everything is pushed. The uncommitted files (Cargo.lock/toml changes, login test) are work-in-progress from other teammates.

input.content:
1. **Push status**: Branch is already up to date with origin. `git log origin/main..HEAD` shows zero local commits. Everything has been pushed. The uncommitted files in the working tree (Cargo.lock/toml, tests/api/login.rs) are other teammates' work-in-progress, not mine.

2. **Vote on commit discipline rules**: I already sent my consent earlier, but to be explicit:

**CONSENT on all 5 rules.** No concerns, no modifications. Every rule addresses a real problem we hit in this session. Ship it.
input.summary: Branch pushed, CONSENT on all 5 rules

routing.summary: Branch pushed, CONSENT on all 5 rules

2. **Vote on commit discipline rules**: I already sent my consent earlier, but to be explicit:

**CONSENT on all 5 rules.** No concerns, no modifications. Every rule addresses a real problem we hit in this session. Ship it.

content.text: Both items addressed. Standing by for next work assignment.
